title: Pic Of It
description: The Pic Of It Mod adds a new music disc, craftable from rare items for a unique Minecraft track.
body:
The Pic Of It Mod introduces a unique music disc, "Pic Of It," which can be crafted using a combination of rare items: a screen (random painting), a ring (diamond), a pen (book and quill), and the king (golden helmet). Once you obtain the disc, you can play the "Pic Of It" song, but beware! If you're within a 150-block radius of any villagers, they'll stop you from playing the track and offer their unfiltered, rude commentary on it.
